name: Chickpeas Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1 lb chick peas, cooked or 3 cans, drained
1 lb fresh spinach, rinsed and torn in pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the chopped onion, minced garlic, sliced carrots, bouillon, and harissa.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until the vegetables are softened, about 20 minutes.
3. Add the chick peas, chopped cilantro, and torn spinach to the pot. Simmer until the spinach is wilted.
4. Serve over cooked brown rice or couscous. Each diner can stir in a little more harissa to suit their own taste.
4 to 6 servings.
